settings.heading: Engine
settings.subtext: Complete engine swaps handled end to end - mounts, wiring, cooling and tuning - so it runs clean, safe and reliable.

settings.title: End To End
settings.text: Mounts, wiring, plumbing, cooling and tuning - the whole swap handled in-house.

settings.title: Clean & Safe
settings.text: Done properly so it's reliable and road-ready, not a headache down the track.

settings.title: Tuned To Suit
settings.text: The new combination tuned so it runs right, drives well and stays dependable.

settings.heading: Swaps Done Properly
settings.body1: Whether you're upgrading performance or replacing a tired engine, we handle engine conversions from start to finish. From mounts and wiring to plumbing, cooling, and tuning, every detail is sorted so your swap runs safely, reliably, and performs like it belongs there.
settings.points: Complete engine swaps | Mounts, wiring & plumbing | Cooling & fuelling sorted | Tuned and road-ready
settings.seo_description: Engine conversions and swaps in Sunshine West - mounts, wiring, cooling and tuning handled end to end for a clean, safe, reliable result. Niche Automotive.
settings.strip_sub: Tell us the car and the engine you want in it, and we'll map out the swap.

settings.title: Book Your Car In
settings.copy: Send through your details and what you need, and we'll get back to you to book you in or track down a part.
